reference: Hi, my child is two years old and he has been advised circumcision. The doctor suggested laser circumcision, so I just want to know whether it will be done with general anesthesia or local anesthesia. What type of precautions should I take? Will this be painful for my two-year-old child?
text: Hi, my child is two years old, and he has been advised circumcision. The doctor suggested laser circumcision, so I just want to know whether it will be done with general anesthesia or local anesthesia? What type of precautions should I take? Will this be painful for my two-year-old child?
